name: Parkour Race
author: Poki
description: Parkour Race is a 3D running game developed by Madbox. Take control of your stickman and race against the crowd. You can run, dash or jump from rooftop to rooftop! Run over the glowing speed bumpers to gain momentum and do vaults and flips to show off your style. There are daily challenges, power-ups, and even glamorous accessories for you to create a stickman that looks like no other. Take your running game to next level with Parkour Race! How to play: Move Left - A or Left arrow key Move Right - D or Right arrow key About the creator: Parkour Race was created by Madbox. Play their other games on Poki: Idle Ants and Stickman Hook
